current_life_events: Her mother's condition has continued to decline, requiring more intense caregiving; she's fallen behind on her freelance work and is struggling to meet deadlines, while also dealing with unexpected car repairs and a looming tax season at her accounting job.
mental_state: Feeling overwhelmed by the mounting responsibilities and pressures, doubting her ability to manage everything.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The cumulative effect of her mother's declining health, financial strain, and work pressures has pushed her to a breaking point, making her realize she can't handle everything on her own and needs support.
